title: Feature Root: Bead Prioritization
description: Shared execution root for bead priority support across the model, CLI, scheduler, and follow-up validation work.
acceptance_criteria: All implementation, validation, documentation, and review beads for bead prioritization are represented under this feature root.
Child bead ordering preserves dependency-safe delivery: model first, then scheduler/CLI work, then shared follow-up validation and signoff.
The completed bead tree covers persistence, CLI mutation/display, scheduler ordering, backward compatibility, and operator-facing confirmation/error behavior from the spec.
